items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: andrea stella praises oscar's improvement 🫶🏻 "i'm extremely pleased with how much oscar cashed…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：安德莉亚·斯特拉称赞Oscar取得了显著的进步 🫶🏻 “我对Oscar所取得的成就感到非常满意。这一切都离不开Oscar团队、Oscar的工程师们以及Oscar本人的努力。他在奥地利度过的这个美好周末确实值得称赞。他所取得的成就真是令人鼓舞。”
items.summary: andrea stella praises oscar's improvement 🫶🏻 "i'm extremely pleased with how much oscar cashed in all the learning and the work that was done by team oscar, oscar's engineers, and oscar himself. he deserves the strong weekend in austria. it's very encouraging what he achieved." https://t.co/MYTaVrqka7
items.summary_zh: 安德莉亚·斯特拉称赞Oscar取得了显著的进步 🫶🏻 “我对Oscar所取得的成就感到非常满意。这一切都离不开Oscar团队、Oscar的工程师们以及Oscar本人的努力。他在奥地利度过的这个美好周末确实值得称赞。他所取得的成就真是令人鼓舞。”
